hooks.command: cd /Users/marquisehumphreys/AI-Knowledgebase && STATUS=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null) && if [ -n "$STATUS" ]; then FILES=$(echo "$STATUS" | awk '{print $2}' | head -3 | paste -sd ','); git add -A && git commit -m "auto: save session changes — $FILES" --quiet && git push origin main --quiet; fi 2>/dev/null || true
